description: Frankencoin is a collateral-backed stablecoin (ZCHF) pegged to the Swiss Franc, where users open positions by depositing collateral (WBTC, wstETH, cbBTC, LsETH, and others) via the MintingHub to mint ZCHF. All core protocol contracts are immutable with no admin upgrade keys. The system relies on a challenge mechanism for liquidations, a reserve pool (Equity/FPS) holding {{equityReserve}}, and StablecoinBridges to XCHF and VCHF for fiat-backed redemption. Chainlink CCIP infrastructure provides cross-chain bridging with burn/mint capabilities on the ZCHF token.

eth:0xDe12B620A8a714476A97EfD14E6F7180Ca.name: MintingHub (Current)
eth:0xDe12B620A8a714476A97EfD14E6F7180Ca.description: Immutable contract that serves as the primary entry point for opening collateral positions, cloning existing positions, initiating challenges, and processing bids. Controls Frankencoin minting and burning functions on behalf of position holders. Each new position requires a 1000 ZCHF opening fee and collateral deposit. Total collateral locked in positions: {{mintingHubV2Aggregate}}.

eth:0x7546762fdb1a6d9146b33960545C3f6394.name: MintingHub (Legacy)
eth:0x7546762fdb1a6d9146b33960545C3f6394.description: Older immutable MintingHub no longer actively used for new positions. Retains minter permissions on the Frankencoin token but most functions are marked as not called from this contract. Residual collateral in legacy positions: {{mintingHubV1Aggregate}}.

eth:0x7bbe8F18040aF0032f4C2435E7a76db6F1.name: StablecoinBridge (XCHF)
eth:0x7bbe8F18040aF0032f4C2435E7a76db6F1.description: Immutable bridge contract that enables 1:1 minting of ZCHF by depositing XCHF (CryptoFranc) and burning ZCHF to redeem XCHF. Minting is capped at 10M ZCHF and has an expiration date. The bridge holds negligible XCHF as it is largely deprecated.

eth:0x3B71ba73299F925a837836160c3E1Fec74.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
eth:0x3B71ba73299F925a837836160c3E1Fec74.description: Immutable bridge contract that enables 1:1 minting of ZCHF by depositing VCHF (VNX Franc) and burning ZCHF to redeem VCHF. Minting is capped at 2M ZCHF and has an expiration date. Currently holds {{vchfBridgeBalance}} in VCHF backing.

eth:0x27d9AD987BdE08a0d083ef7e0e4043C857.name: Savings (Current)
eth:0x27d9AD987BdE08a0d083ef7e0e4043C857.description: Immutable savings contract that allows ZCHF holders to deposit and earn interest. Can call coverLoss on the Frankencoin token to absorb losses from the savings pool. Holds {{savingsCurrentBalance}} in deposited ZCHF.

eth:0x3BF301B0e2003E75A3e86AB82bD1EFF6A9.name: Savings (Legacy)
eth:0x3BF301B0e2003E75A3e86AB82bD1EFF6A9.description: Older immutable savings contract with the same interface as the current version. Can call coverLoss on the Frankencoin token. Holds {{savingsLegacyBalance}} in residual ZCHF deposits.

eth:0xAD0107D3Da540Fd54b1931735b65110C90.name: PositionRoller
eth:0xAD0107D3Da540Fd54b1931735b65110C90.description: Immutable utility contract that allows position holders to roll their collateral into new positions. Uses flash loan mechanics (mint then burn within the same transaction) on the Frankencoin token. No direct capital exposure as operations are atomic.

eth:0x1bA26788dfDe592fec8bcB0Eaff472a42B.name: Equity (FPS Reserve Pool)
eth:0x1bA26788dfDe592fec8bcB0Eaff472a42B.description: Immutable reserve pool contract that holds the protocol's equity buffer. The kamikaze function allows burning FPS tokens to withdraw a proportional share of the reserve, with {{equityReserve}} in direct capital exposure. The restructureCapTable function can redistribute shares but is bounded by a value range constraint. This contract is the backstop for the protocol: losses from challenged positions are covered from the reserve.

eth:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
eth:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000.description: Renounced permission on CryptoFranc (XCHF). The acceptOwnership and migrateFrom functions are assigned to the zero address, meaning these capabilities are permanently disabled.

eth:0xf72eE0D3a252eA41845ec1185d8495e224.name: VNXCToken Implementation
eth:0xf72eE0D3a252eA41845ec1185d8495e224.description: The implementation contract behind the VCHF (VNX Franc) EIP-1967 proxy. Controls administrative functions on VNXCToken including minter role assignment, asset protection, transfer provider changes, minting, burning, freezing, and pausing. This is an external dependency operated by the VNX team, not a Frankencoin-controlled admin.

eth:0x79d4f0232A66c4c91b89c76362016A1707.name: VNX Franc (VCHF)
eth:0x79d4f0232A66c4c91b89c76362016A1707.description: ERC-20 stablecoin issued by VNX, used as collateral in the StablecoinBridge (VCHF) for 1:1 ZCHF minting. The token is upgradeable via an EIP-1967 proxy controlled by VNXProxyAdmin, and its owner (VNXManager) can mint, burn, freeze, and pause transfers. Total funds at risk through the VCHF bridge: {{vchfBridgeBalance}}.

eth:0xB4272071eCAdd69d933AdcD19cA99fe806.name: CryptoFranc (XCHF)
eth:0xB4272071eCAdd69d933AdcD19cA99fe806.description: ERC-20 Swiss Franc stablecoin used as collateral in the StablecoinBridge (XCHF) for 1:1 ZCHF minting. Owned by a 3/4 XCHF multisig that can pause, migrate, and reassign minter roles. The bridge is largely deprecated with negligible XCHF holdings.

eth:0x9359cd75549DaE00Cdd8D22297BC9B13Fb.name: Chainlink BurnMintTokenPool
eth:0x9359cd75549DaE00Cdd8D22297BC9B13Fb.description: Chainlink CCIP token pool that holds burn/mint permissions on the Frankencoin token for cross-chain transfers. Can mint ZCHF without collateral backing when receiving cross-chain messages, and burn ZCHF when sending. Operated by Chainlink's CCIP infrastructure.

eth:0x88fd2ECD0B9250F203e99E80eb78b0C32B.name: Chainlink BridgeAccounting
eth:0x88fd2ECD0B9250F203e99E80eb78b0C32B.description: Chainlink CCIP accounting contract that holds minter permissions on the Frankencoin token. Can call coverLoss (unbounded, no mitigations) and collectProfits on the Frankencoin reserve. Controlled by Chainlink infrastructure.

eth:0xf98c221661F51578f5E5236B189a493E2a.name: Chainlink TransferReference
eth:0xf98c221661F51578f5E5236B189a493E2a.description: Chainlink CCIP contract that holds minter permissions on the Frankencoin token including registerPosition, mint, mintWithReserve, burnFrom, burnWithoutReserve, burnWithReserve, burnFromWithReserve, coverLoss, and collectProfits. All functions are marked as not called from this contract.

eth:0x411dE17f12D1A34ecC7F45f49844626267.name: Chainlink ARMProxy
eth:0x411dE17f12D1A34ecC7F45f49844626267.description: Chainlink Active Risk Management proxy used by PositionRoller and MintingHub for cross-chain risk checks. Called during position rolling and cloning operations. Owned by a Chainlink RBACTimelock with a 3-hour minimum delay.

eth:0x44835bBBA9D40DEDa9b64858095EcFB269.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock (ARMProxy)
eth:0x44835bBBA9D40DEDa9b64858095EcFB269.description: Chainlink timelock (3-hour minimum delay) that owns the ARMProxy contract. Can transfer ARMProxy ownership and replace its implementation. Operated by Chainlink's role-based access control system.

eth:0x6608920e3F6b591EC3Cf15CA1DDf66fBE1.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock (RMNRemote)
eth:0x6608920e3F6b591EC3Cf15CA1DDf66fBE1.description: Chainlink timelock (3-hour minimum delay) that owns the RMNRemote contract. Can configure the Risk Management Network, curse/uncurse chains, and transfer ownership. Part of Chainlink's CCIP security infrastructure.

eth:0xC8bB8eDa94931cA2F20EF43eA7dBD58E68.name: VNX Proxy Admin
eth:0xC8bB8eDa94931cA2F20EF43eA7dBD58E68.description: Proxy admin for the VCHF (VNXCToken) EIP-1967 proxy. Can upgrade the VCHF token implementation and change the admin. Owned by an EOA (0x7B0C...9403), giving VNX full control over the VCHF token contract.

eth:0xd66a4bC77C3bF8f3Ab1827112F4ff70f0d.name: XCHF Owner 3/4 Multisig
eth:0xd66a4bC77C3bF8f3Ab1827112F4ff70f0d.description: 3-of-4 multisig that owns the CryptoFranc (XCHF) token. Can transfer ownership, pause/unpause the token, assign new minters, and initiate token migrations. Operated by the XCHF team.

eth:0x318CeE69D79c8e96FB8C63D89FD5505CE4.name: XCHF Minter 3/6 Multisig
eth:0x318CeE69D79c8e96FB8C63D89FD5505CE4.description: 3-of-6 multisig with minting rights on the CryptoFranc (XCHF) token. Can mint new XCHF tokens, which could indirectly affect the StablecoinBridge if minted XCHF is used to mint ZCHF.

eth:0x958571619fFf444365B1F3d52DDb7E3103.name: XCHF Operator 3/6 Multisig
eth:0x958571619fFf444365B1F3d52DDb7E3103.description: 3-of-6 multisig with operator rights on the CryptoFranc (XCHF) token. Can announce rollovers and refund foreign tokens accidentally sent to the contract.

eth:0x1bA26788dfDe592fec8bcB0Eaff472a42B.name: Equity (FPS Reserve Pool)
eth:0x1bA26788dfDe592fec8bcB0Eaff472a42B.description: Protocol reserve pool that backs the ZCHF stablecoin. Holds {{equityReserve}} primarily in ZCHF, serving as the loss-absorption buffer for challenged and liquidated positions. FPS token holders have a proportional claim on this reserve.

eth:0xDe12B620A8a714476A97EfD14E6F7180Ca.name: MintingHub V2 (Collateral Positions)
eth:0xDe12B620A8a714476A97EfD14E6F7180Ca.description: Current MintingHub with {{mintingHubV2Aggregate}} locked across 51 collateral positions including WBTC, cbBTC, wstETH, LsETH, BOSS, PAXG, XAUt, and other assets. This represents the majority of protocol collateral.

eth:0x27d9AD987BdE08a0d083ef7e0e4043C857.name: Savings (Current)
eth:0x27d9AD987BdE08a0d083ef7e0e4043C857.description: Current savings contract holding {{savingsCurrentBalance}} in deposited ZCHF from users earning interest on their stablecoin holdings.

eth:0x3B71ba73299F925a837836160c3E1Fec74.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
eth:0x3B71ba73299F925a837836160c3E1Fec74.description: Bridge contract holding {{vchfBridgeBalance}} in VCHF tokens backing ZCHF minted through the 1:1 VCHF-to-ZCHF bridge.

eth:0x7546762fdb1a6d9146b33960545C3f6394.name: MintingHub V1 (Legacy Positions)
eth:0x7546762fdb1a6d9146b33960545C3f6394.description: Legacy MintingHub with {{mintingHubV1Aggregate}} remaining in 2 collateral positions (WBTC). Being gradually wound down as positions expire.

eth:0x3BF301B0e2003E75A3e86AB82bD1EFF6A9.name: Savings (Legacy)
eth:0x3BF301B0e2003E75A3e86AB82bD1EFF6A9.description: Legacy savings contract holding {{savingsLegacyBalance}} in residual ZCHF deposits.

eth:0xB58E61C3098d85632Df34EecfB899A1Ed8.name: Frankencoin (ZCHF Token)
eth:0xB58E61C3098d85632Df34EecfB899A1Ed8.description: The ZCHF stablecoin token with a total market capitalization of {{zchfMarketCap}}. Immutable ERC-20 with built-in minter registry and reserve accounting.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
